wins: Q4 revenue, gross margin, and EPS were all above guidance
Launched Core Ultra Series 3 ahead of schedule
Intel 18A production is progressing well with improving yields
Intel 14A development is on track with PDK 0.5 released
NVIDIA's $5 billion investment closed as expected
risks: Supply constraints limiting ability to meet demand
Lower gross margin due to Panther Lake's cost structure
CapEx is flat to slightly down in 2026
Inventory levels are low and supply is constrained
